basic_details.job_title: BITS Pilani Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate I Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani)
basic_details.post_name: Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate - I
basic_details.short_information: Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani) Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate - I Notification 2026 has been released on 06 June 2026 on the official website of BITS Pilani. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age relaxation is allowed as per government rule.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc/M.E/M.Tech (or) equivalent, B.E/B.Tech candidates with significant experience in research or industry +GATE/NET qualified
qualification.details: M.Sc/M.E/M.Tech (or) equivalent or B.E/B.Tech with significant experience in research or industry +GATE/NET qualified.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate - I

post_wise_breakdown.post_name: Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate - I

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- per month as JRF for NET/GATE Candidates Rs. 30,000/- per month as Project Associate-I for Non NET/GATE Candidates

selection_process: experience and project requirements Online Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 06-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 06-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate-1 recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 06 July 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess an M.Sc/M.E/M.Tech (or equivalent) or B.E/B.Tech degree with significant research or industry experience, and must be GATE/NET qualified.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate-1 position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this position is 28 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 30,000 to Rs. 37,000 per month, depending on whether the candidate is NET/GATE qualified.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate-1 post?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your resume and required documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate-1 role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on merit, experience, and project requirements, followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate-1.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link will be available in the "Important Links" section of this article.
